name: openstreetmap-local-leads
description: Search OpenStreetMap place data and normalize local-business rows for lightweight prospecting.
business_value: No-key local lead discovery for agencies, service providers, and field sales.

inputs.name: query
inputs.note: Business category plus location, such as 'dentist Austin Texas'.

auth.note: Use a descriptive user agent and follow public Nominatim usage policy.

verification_result: Live smoke checked Nominatim search for 'dentist Austin Texas' and received place rows without an API key.
known_risks: Public Nominatim has strict light-use limits.
Rows can lack websites or phone numbers.
Data quality depends on OpenStreetMap community coverage.
